svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="事故教训的三种固化载体" id="inccarriers"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-121" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="440" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="事故教训固化成什么:三种载体从硬到软" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="420" x="280" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0f766e;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="git hook · 最硬
动作发生瞬间拦截
判断简单(分支名/文件名)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="280" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2563eb;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="pre-commit 脚本 · 次硬
提交前拦截
判断中等(正则扫SQL/契约)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="280" x="350" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="Agent 评审规则 · 最软
评审时拦截
判断复杂(理解语义/逻辑)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="280" x="660" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="例:推错分支 → 拦 push
危险命令 → 拦执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="280" x="40" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="例:JOIN 漏 tenant_id → 扫
URL↔路由对不上 → 扫" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="280" x="350" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="例:缺幂等校验 → 标红
边界场景漏 → 标红" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="280" x="660" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="principle" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="原则:能早拦的别晚拦 · 严重度决定载体 · 载体和能力匹配
安全级用 hook,优化级用 Agent 规则,跨层契约用脚本" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="740" x="120" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="← 硬 · 不可绕过 软 · 可被覆盖但留痕 →" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="900" x="40" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
